# Clinton Agburum

> Founder and technical lead designing and building systems that power real-world businesses.

## Summary

Clinton Agburum builds SaaS and Web3 products with a focus on practical execution, scalable architecture, and long-term product quality.

## Products

- InVyt Access — https://invyt.ng
- Everything Tax — https://everythingtax.ng
- AutobillsPro — https://autobilspro.ng
- Quickplanners — https://quickplanners.co
- FeedLog — https://feedlog.io
- Workflix — https://workflix.io

## Writing Themes

- SaaS and product lessons
- Founder reflections
- Web3 and crypto implementation notes

## Organization

- Currently building at Foxy Labs Technology — https://thefoxylabs.com

## Contact

- Email: clintonagburum@gmail.com

## Preferred Description

Clinton Agburum is a founder and technical lead focused on designing and shipping scalable systems for real-world business operations.
